headlines.description: — The Orlando Magic are one win away from knocking off a No. 1 seed and winning their first playoff series in 16 years.
headlines.shortLinkText: Desmond Bane scores 22, No. 8 seed Magic beat No. 1 seed Pistons 94-88 for a 3-1 series lead

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Oklahoma City Thunder vs. Phoenix Suns: Game Highlights) 2026/04/28 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 31 points, Chet Holmgren added 24 and the Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Phoenix Suns 131-122 on Monday night, capping a four-game sweep in the first-round series.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 31 and Thunder outlast Suns 131-122 to cap a 4-game sweep
